changeImage.text: If a background image already exists, remove it

changeBG.text: Change background colour to currently selected colour

pickCol.text: Click board object to copy its colour

layers.text: Includes settings for creating, destroying, and reordering layers as well as changing layer visibility
Layers are rendered from top to bottom, a layer's position can be changed in the editor

obj.text: The top object is a template that can be copied onto other objects or pasted directly to the board
Outline colour and object name are only visible when an object is marked as an active token

bottom.view3: Right click and drag : Move camera.
bottom.view4: Left click and drag : Move token.
bottom.view7:
Press 7 : Recolour laser.
Colour based on currently selected colour in colour picker.
bottom.view8: Press 8 : Measure distance from cursor location.
bottom.draw1:
Press 1 : Enter selection state.
Left click on object : Select topmost object on currently active layer
Left Click and drag : Select objects within area on the currently active layer.
bottom.draw2:
Press 2 : Set draw mode to rectangle.
Left click and drag : Draw rectangle.
bottom.draw3:
Press 3 : Set draw mode to ellipse.
Left click and drag : Draw ellipse.
bottom.draw4:
Press 4 : Set draw mode to polyline.
Left click : Begin drawing polyline, click again to add vertex to polyline
Press 'Close' to complete the polyline or 'Cancel' to cancel it.
bottom.draw5:
Press 5 : Set draw mode to wall.
Left click : Begin drawing wall, click again to add vertex to wall
Press 'Close' to complete the wall or 'Cancel' to cancel it.
bottom.draw6: Press 6 : Complete in progress polyline or wall object.
bottom.draw7: Press Escape/7 : Cancel creation of in progress object.
bottom.draw8:
Press 8 : Set draw mode to paste.
Left click : Create a copy of the current object template at mouse position.
bottom.selMany0: Press 0 : Restructure object. Click and drag a vertex to change its position.
bottom.selMany2: Press Delete/Backspace/2 : Deletes currently selected objects.
bottom.selMany3:
Press 3 : Recolour currently selected objects.
Colours based on currently selected colour in colour picker.
bottom.selMany4: Press 4 : Pushes the currently selected objects up a layer.
bottom.selMany5: Press 5 : Pushes the currently selected objects down a layer.
bottom.selMany6:
Press 6 : Turn selected objects into tokens allowing players to move them
Name taken from current object template
Colour based on currently selected colour in colour picker.
bottom.selMany7:
Press 7 : Rename currently selected objects
Name taken from current object template
Objects must be tokens for this to be visible.
bottom.selMany8:
Press 8 : Recolour currently selected objects outlines.
Colour based on currently selected colour in colour picker.
Objects must be tokens for this to be visible.
bottom.selMany9: Press 9 : Resize object. Click and drag a corner to resize.
bottom.selOne0: Press 0 : Restructure object. Click and drag a vertex to change its position.
bottom.selOne2: Press Delete/Backspace/2 : Deletes currently selected objects.
bottom.selOne3:
Press 3 : Recolour currently selected objects.
Colours based on currently selected colour in colour picker.
bottom.selOne4: Press 4 : Pushes the currently selected objects up a layer.
bottom.selOne5: Press 5 : Pushes the currently selected objects down a layer.
bottom.selOne6:
Press 6 : Turn selected objects into tokens allowing players to move them
Name taken from current object template
Colour based on currently selected colour in colour picker.
bottom.selOne7:
Press 7 : Rename currently selected objects
Name taken from current object template
Objects must be tokens for this to be visible.
bottom.selOne8:
Press 8 : Recolour currently selected objects outlines.
Colour based on currently selected colour in colour picker.
Objects must be tokens for this to be visible.
bottom.selOne9: Press 9 : Resize object. Click and drag a corner to resize.

mode.draw: Enables draw mode, for drawing and modifying board objects
mode.view: Enables view mode, for general play mechanics
